overall.description: First-person exploration of a post-apocalyptic desert geyser basin at sunset, featuring erupting geysers, abandoned wooden structures, and industrial wreckage. The footage is from a high-quality video game engine with cinematic golden-hour lighting and a visible weapon at the bottom of the screen.

scene_state.functional_zone: open geyser basin with distant mesas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the open geyser field, observing the erupting geysers and distant rock formations

entered.detail: multiple active geysers erupting steam and water across the basin
large flat-topped rock formations on the horizon
tall layered rock walls forming the canyon boundary

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a wide desert geyser basin during golden hour. Multiple geysers erupt across the center of the frame while distant mesas rise on the left and canyon cliffs line the right. The camera moves forward through the open terrain with sparse vegetation and clear skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: canyon base with abandoned wooden structures

events.description: approaching canyon cliff walls and abandoned wooden shacks on the right

agents.ego_description: walking along the canyon base, approaching the abandoned wooden structures and scaffolding

entered.detail: dilapidated wooden buildings and shacks built against the cliff wall
rusted scaffolding structures attached to the cliff face

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to the canyon base where abandoned wooden shacks and scaffolding appear on the right. The canyon cliffs loom closer while the open geyser field remains visible to the left. The camera continues forward along the dirt path.

events.description: large tilted metal wreckage comes into view ahead

agents.ego_description: navigating through the ruins, passing the large tilted wreckage and approaching utility poles

entered.detail: massive triangular metal structure tilted at an angle, possibly a shipwreck or collapsed building
tall wooden utility poles with crossbars and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the abandoned settlement, passing close to the large tilted wreckage that dominates the center of the frame. Wooden shacks line the right side while utility poles appear in the distance. The terrain becomes more cluttered with debris and ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: confined area with utility infrastructure and active geyser

events.description: approaching close erupting geyser with heavy steam
entering shadow of cliff and wreckage, lighting becomes darker

agents.ego_description: approaching the close erupting geyser, moving past utility poles and power lines

entered.detail: large active geyser erupting violently with steam and water spray
horizontal wires strung between utility poles

segments.scene_description: The final segment moves through a more confined area between the wreckage and cliff walls. The camera approaches a large actively erupting geyser with heavy steam clouds. Utility poles and power lines line the left side while the lighting shifts to mixed shadows as the sun becomes partially obscured.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement from a wide, erupting geyser basin into the claustrophobic ruins of a canyon settlement. It begins in the open desert under a golden sky, gliding past active geysers with distant mesas and canyon cliffs framing the horizon. As the camera advances, the terrain narrows toward the canyon base where abandoned wooden shacks and scaffolding emerge on the right. The scene then shifts into a cluttered settlement, passing close to a massive piece of tilted wreckage and weathered utility poles before the path tightens between cliff walls. Finally, the camera approaches a towering geyser shrouded in heavy steam, as the warm light fades into mixed shadows beneath the looming canyon heights.
